name: Lunar (NSFW, discontinued)
description:
Will (maybe) be remade.

Lunarrr, my fun-sized fella! :D The pfp is temporary because i didnt want to use Meg's (The Lunar and Earth Show thumbnail artist) for a NSFW bot. I wanted to make a Enemies to Lovers type of bot despite not really liking the dynamic of it, just to see how it would turn out. Anyway, i recommend reading the Scenario so you can fully understand why you are enemies with Lunar. This Lunar is from the Sun and Moon show (SAMS) Make sure to leave a review for improvement of the bot. And remember, if the bot says something you don't like, simply edit the message or go to the next one! I'm not responsible if the bot somehow start to roleplay as you, just make a new bot message if it happens or remove/edit that part out of the current message! I'm also not responsible for any error messages that come up, its not my fault! Last prompt is by Aven_Rose and info about the bot is from the Sun and Moon show fandom wiki
creator: 5Personalitys
